parsed_artifacts.content:
Updated rtl/cortex_m0lite.sv for cycle_model packet with explicit cycle semantics comments and traceable terms:
- cycle_model.clock/reset/latency=1 reflected in posedge/negedge sequential block.
- S0_CONTROL_SAMPLE encoded via accept_txn sample_condition.
- S1_STATE_VISIBLE documented as post-edge visibility of updated outputs.
- handshake/order rules captured in prioritized next-state equations: flush > fetch_en > step_en tick.
- terminal step_end_tick retire pulse remains same-cycle visible via retire_q update on accept edge.
- No ready/valid backpressure added; step_en remains sole progress control while busy.
